home.intro: I'm a developer and writer. I work at Deloitte as a consultant for Data Engineering and AI Engineering with a strong focus on Databricks. Previously, I was an AI Engineer at Deutsche Bundesbank.

games.title: Games
games.subtitle: Take a break and play something fun

wordle.title: Wordle
wordle.instructions: Guess the word in 6 tries. Each guess must be a valid 5-letter word. The color of the tiles will change to show how close your guess was.

solver.title: Wordle Solver
solver.description: Get help solving any Wordle puzzle

demo.title: Solver Demo
demo.description: Watch the algorithm solve Wordle step by step

solver.enterGuess: Enter your guess and mark each letter
solver.clickToMark: Click tiles to cycle: absent → present → correct

kniffel.title: Kniffel
kniffel.instructions: Roll dice and score combinations. Play digitally or use as a tracker for physical dice.
